payload.answer: I could not remember the article because the URL fetch failed with a 404/network error. No durable memory was created from unavailable source content.

entity_resolution.reason: The article content could not be fetched due to a 404/network error, so there are no source claims to extract or store.

details: No memory cards created because source content was unavailable.

repair_options: Provide a working URL for the article.
Retry fetching the URL later if the error may be temporary.
